title: PctClipSettings
description: Settings for the percentile clipping sync task.

min_pct.description:
Lower percentile (0-100) used to clip values. Must satisfy:
- min_pct >= 0
- min_pct < max_pct

max_pct.description:
Upper percentile (0-100) used to clip values. Must satisfy:
- max_pct <= 100
- max_pct > min_pct

roi.description:
Elliptical region of interest expressed in normalized coordinates. Must satisfy:
- 0 <= cx <= 1
- 0 <= cy <= 1
- 0 < rx <= 1
- 0 < ry <= 1

cx.description:
Normalized horizontal center. Must satisfy:
- 0 <= cx <= 1

cy.description:
Normalized vertical center. Must satisfy:
- 0 <= cy <= 1

rx.description:
Normalized horizontal radius. Must satisfy:
- 0 < rx <= 1

ry.description:
Normalized vertical radius. Must satisfy:
- 0 < ry <= 1
